import { IconArrowNarrowUp } from "@tabler/icons-react";

export const dashboardMetrics = [
    {
        id: "total-orders",
        label: "Total orders",
        value: "12,832",
        trend: "up",
        trendValue: "+28.1%",
        helperText: "+2,123 today",
    },
    {
        id: "total-sales",
        label: "Total Sales",
        value: "$12,832.80",
        trend: "up",
        trendValue: "+18.8%",
        helperText: "+$1,895 today",
    },
    {
        id: "visits",
        label: "Visits",
        value: "1,062",
        trend: "down",
        trendValue: "-10%",
        helperText: "-426 today",
    },
    {
        id: "conversion-rate",
        label: "Conversion rate",
        value: "90%",
        trend: "up",
        trendValue: "+12%",
        helperText: "+42 today",
    },
];
